desc: Pins boss ~3 sec, phase 1 only, 2 uses

providers.name: Margit's Shackle
providers.loc: Buy from Patches, Murkwater Cave (5000 runes)

desc: Pins Mohg ~3 sec, phase 1 only, 2 uses
Negates Nihil phase transition (unavoidable damage otherwise)

providers.name: Purifying Crystal Tear
providers.loc: Eleonora invasion, Second Church of Marika, Altus Plateau

desc: Sleep one Godskin, fight the other. Trivializes the encounter.

providers.name: Sword of St. Trina
providers.loc: Forsaken Ruins, Caelid (Stonesword Key). 66 sleep/hit, 136 buffed. Puts Noble to sleep in 2 hits.

providers.name: Sleep Pot
providers.loc: Craft via Fevor's Cookbook [1], Limgrave graveyard near Summonwater Village

providers.name: St. Trina's Torch
providers.loc: Consecrated Snowfield caravan chest. 72 sleep/hit, offhand option.

desc: Charm Niall's summons to fight for you. Turns 3v1 into 1v1+allies.

providers.name: Bewitching Branch
providers.loc: Buy x5 from merchant near Bellum Church, Liurnia (1600 runes each). Loot x3 at Church of Pilgrimage, Weeping Peninsula.

desc: Parries golden Destined Death attacks. Timing window.

providers.name: Blasphemous Claw
providers.loc: Dropped by Recusant Bernahl invasion, Farum Azula

desc: Interrupts Waterfowl Dance via frostbite proc. Throw as she jumps.

providers.name: Freezing Pot
providers.loc: Craft via Glintstone Craftsman's Cookbook [6], Caria Manor side room. Needs Ritual Pot + Rimed Crystal Bud.

desc: Gimmick weapon in boss arena. Zero stat requirements. Produces light blades that reach through lava. Can fast-travel out to upgrade before fighting.

providers.name: Serpent-Hunter
providers.loc: Corpse to the left immediately inside Rykard's boss arena. Pick up before approaching boss. Can fast-travel out to upgrade with Somber Stones before fighting.

desc: Raid-style fight. Up to 6 NPC summons active simultaneously from glowing banners across arena. Signs respawn ~25s after death. No rune penalty. Can win with summons doing most damage.

providers.name: Festival NPC Summons (up to 8)
providers.loc: Gold summon signs at spectral banners throughout arena. Always available: Alexander, Okina, Lionel, Therolina (healer). Quest-dependent: Blaidd (Mistwood), Tragoth (not assassinated). Jerren (phase 2 only). Avoid Patches — he flees immediately.

bosses: Radagon of the Golden Order and Elden Beast
desc: Both phases deal heavy Holy damage. At 40 VIG, big holy attacks 2-shot without mitigation. Stacking talisman + incantation or dried liver reaches 50-70% negation, shifting to 4-5 shot.

providers.name: Lord's Divine Fortification
providers.loc: Incantation (27 Faith). Buy from Brother Corhyn or Miriel after giving Golden Order Principia. ~60% holy negation. Stacks with talisman.

providers.name: Haligdrake Talisman +2
providers.loc: Mohgwyn Palace, graveyard southwest of dynasty mausoleum near blood lake. 20% holy negation. No stat requirement. Stacks with incantations and dried liver.

providers.name: Holyproof Dried Liver
providers.loc: Craftable via Missionary's Cookbook [6]. 35% holy negation for 120 sec. No stat requirement. Stacks with talisman but not incantations.
